To get your Sardis API key:
1. Log in to your [Sardis Dashboard](https://sardis.sh/dashboard).
2. Navigate to **Settings** -> **API Keys**.
3. Copy your API key (starts with `sk_`).
Execute a policy-controlled payment from: Execute a policy-controlled payment from a Sardis wallet.
Check wallet balance and spending limits: Check wallet balance and spending limits.
Simulate a transaction against spending: Simulate a transaction against spending policies without executing it.
Set or update spending policies on a Sar: Set or update spending policies on a Sardis agent using natural language.
Retrieve transaction history from a Sard: Retrieve transaction history from a Sardis wallet ledger.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点

Maximum number of transactions to return: Maximum number of transactions to return (default: 50)
